# Phase 2 Zudilin 2002 coupled linear map probe

- Probe id: `bz_phase2_zudilin_2002_coupled_linear_map_probe`

## Note

A single constant `2x2` rational linear transformation, fitted from `n=1,2`, does not carry the Zudilin ordered pair to the baseline ordered pair on the full shared window. This closes the simplest coupled linear ansatz.

## Next step

If we continue on coupled maps, the next bounded family should allow `n`-dependence or another structured two-channel transformation, not just a constant matrix.
